bigquery_options.description: Specifies options for BigQuery as the destination, such as using partitioned tables for logs.

custom_writer_identity.description: Specifies the IAM identity to be used as the writer for the log sink; must be a valid service account or group.

description.description: Specifies a description for the logging sink, providing context or details about its purpose or usage.

destination.description: Specifies the destination for the logging sink, such as a Cloud Storage bucket, BigQuery dataset, or Pub/Sub topic. Must be a valid resource identifier.

disabled.description: Indicates whether the log sink is disabled; set to true to disable the sink.

exclusions.description: Defines log exclusions to filter out specific log entries from being exported by the logging sink. Must be a list of exclusion blocks with filter expressions and optional descriptions.

filter.description: Defines the advanced filter expression used to match log entries for inclusion in the sink, using the Logging query language.

name.description: Unique name for the logging sink within the project, must comply with naming conventions.

unique_writer_identity.description: Determines whether a unique service account is created for the sink to write logs; set to true to enable creation.
